stance: Risk-on momentum-led midcap, leaning into names where price momentum and rising analyst revisions agree; pruning refuted laggards and signal-less corporate-action fragments.
experience_note: This is an early round (no graded review yet), so I am pre-registering what would make me change course. I am watching whether the corroborated leaders (momentum + rising revisions) outperform the single-signal momentum blow-offs over the next 1-3 months — if the blow-off names (very high momentum z, e.g. the telecom-equipment leader) keep leading while my corroborated picks lag, my "two-forces-must-agree" sizing rule is wrong and I should weight raw momentum more. I am also watching the names I am cutting on falling revisions (Voltas, SRF, Fortis, Persistent): if they bounce hard, revision momentum was a poor exit trigger here. And I am watching whether trimming the signal-less Vedanta fragments costs me — if those re-rate on demerger value-unlock that the signals can't see, my "no signal = no weight" rule needs a corporate-action override.
guardrail_notes: dropped 23 non-priceable/unknown ticker(s): POWERINDIA, APARINDS, POLYCAB, SUPREMEIND, FEDERALBNK, POONAWALLA, CHOLAHLDNG, TVSMOTOR
